name_en: P🆕【Premium Original】🔥【Exclusive Background】💋 26 Early Spring New LouLou Medium Size Sheepskin, soft and smooth to the touch, comes with a removable card holder and mini mirror, features a sliding chain, can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody, meeting multi-occasion matching needs! The new sheepskin has been coated for extra durability and a glossy finish, making the bag look even more exquisite and beautiful❤
